name: previous
description: The value of the previous link href attribute.

params.name: href
params.description: The value of the previous link href attribute.

params.name: text
params.description: Text to use within the previous link, defaults to 'Previous page', with 'page' being visually-hidden. If `html` is provided, the `text` argument will be ignored.

params.name: html
params.description: If `text` is set, this is not required. HTML to use within the previous link. If `html` is provided, the `text` argument will be ignored.

params.name: labelText
params.description: The name of the previous page to include within the previous link text

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the previous link.

name: next
description: The value of the next link href attribute.

params.name: href
params.description: The value of the next link href attribute.

params.name: text
params.description: Text to use within the next link, defaults to 'Next page', with 'page' being visually-hidden. If `html` is provided, the `text` argument will be ignored.

params.name: html
params.description: If `text` is set, this is not required. HTML to use within the next link. If `html` is provided, the `text` argument will be ignored.

params.name: labelText
params.description: The name of the next page to include within the previous link text

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the next link.

name: items
description: Array of items within the pagination component.

params.name: number
params.description: The pagination item text – usually a page number.

params.name: href
params.description: The value of the item link `href`. Required unless the item is an ellipsis.

params.name: visuallyHiddenText
params.description: The visually hidden label for the pagination item, which will be set as an `aria-label` and announced by screen readers on the pagination item link. Should include page number. Defaults to, for example 'Page 1'.

params.name: current
params.description: Set to `true` to indicate the current page the user is on.

params.name: ellipsis
params.description: Set to `true` to specify an ellipsis, indicated skipped pages in a numbered sequence.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the list item.

params.name: attributes
params.description: The HTML attributes (for example, data attributes) to add to the item link.

name: classes
description: Classes to add to the pagination container.

name: attributes
description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the pagination container.
